# The Outfit House

> New Delhi streetwear and sneaker shop. Sells Entry, Standard, and Vault tier
> footwear and apparel via WhatsApp-first ordering. Physical studio in Chattarpur, New Delhi.
> Founded 2026 by Gaurav Kumar (digital & sourcing) and Shivam Kumar (operations & store).

## What We Sell

Sneakers, apparel, bottomwear, and accessories across three build tiers.
All pieces are hand-checked and QC-photographed before dispatch. WhatsApp-first ordering —
no checkout flow, every order is confirmed live with real photos.

### Build Tiers

- **Entry** — PU-blend leather upper, glued sole construction, protective dust bag.
- **Standard** — Genuine leather upper, stitched sole, original tooling box + branded tissue.
- **Vault** — Premium full-grain leather, precision stitching, full branded packaging.

Pricing is not listed online. We quote on WhatsApp (we bargain and run launch offers),
shared along with real photos before any order is confirmed.

### What We Stock

Premium hand-checked footwear and streetwear described by silhouette, material and colour,
never by brand. Footwear: high-tops, low-tops, retro and chunky runners, court sneakers,
skate lows, trail runners, loafers, slides and clogs. Apparel: graphic and cotton tees,
heavyweight and tech hoodies, crewnecks, overshirts, down puffers and shell jackets.
Bottomwear: cargos, joggers, sweats, track pants, work pants and denim. Accessories:
caps, beanies, bucket hats, sunglasses, leather wallets and card holders, belts, bags,
luxury and sports watches, chains, and TOH (our own house line).

### Categories

Sneakers, Apparel (tees/hoodies/overshirts), Bottomwear (cargos/sweats/denim), Accessories (caps/bags/socks).

## How to Order

WhatsApp-first. Browse the online catalog, message to confirm stock and tier, receive QC photos,
then pay via UPI, bank transfer, or COD (available in most metros). Average reply: 7 minutes.

## Key Pages

- https://theoutfithouse.in/ — Homepage, featured drops, tier overview
- https://theoutfithouse.in/about — Founders, story, how the business works
- https://theoutfithouse.in/spec-sheet — Full tier comparison: Entry vs Standard vs Vault
- https://theoutfithouse.in/contact — WhatsApp, Instagram, Facebook, FAQ, store address
- https://theoutfithouse.in/sneakers — Sneaker catalog
- https://theoutfithouse.in/apparel — Apparel catalog
- https://theoutfithouse.in/bottomwear — Bottomwear catalog
- https://theoutfithouse.in/accessories — Accessories catalog
- https://theoutfithouse.in/terms — Exchange & shipping policy, House Rules
- https://theoutfithouse.in/guide — Buying guide: how the Entry, Standard and Vault tiers compare
